Package sailpoint.object

Interface IdentityMatcher

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    Matchmaker
    public interface IdentityMatcher
    An identity matcher can evaluate an IdentitySelector against an identity to determine whether it matches or not. This interface is here to allow classes in the object package to match without explicitly referencing the Matchmaker in the api package.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean isMatch​(IdentitySelector selector, Identity identity)
      Return whether the given identity matches the given selector.

    • Method Detail

      • isMatch

        boolean isMatch​(IdentitySelector selector,
                Identity identity)
         throws GeneralException
        Return whether the given identity matches the given selector.
        Parameters:
        selector - The IdentitySelector to evaluate.
        identity - The Identity to attempt to match.
        Returns:
        True if the given Identity matches the selector, false otherwise.
        Throws:
        GeneralException
